title: micromeria tenuis subsp. tenuis
intro: Micromeria tenuis subsp. tenuis, also known as Thyme-leaved marjoram, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and fight off infections. The health benefits of Micromeria tenuis subsp. tenuis include reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
